meta.source: generated from local OpenClaw CLI status, sessions, and transcript files

useCases.title: GitHub shipping
useCases.description: A meaningful slice of the conversation history revolves around repos, commits, and publishing work.

useCases.title: Workflow automation
useCases.description: OpenClaw is being used to orchestrate scripts, agent flows, and repeatable personal ops.

useCases.title: Lightweight code delivery
useCases.description: Sessions often turn directly into scripts, frontend tweaks, and practical implementation work.

useCases.title: Usage analytics
useCases.description: The dashboard itself reflects an interest in measuring conversation volume, trends, and quota health.

useCases.title: Tasteful UI iteration
useCases.description: There is a recurring preference for clean presentation, visual restraint, and polished framing.

useCases.title: Documentation as product
useCases.description: README and narrative polish show up as a real part of the workflow, not an afterthought.

recentSessions.title: Hermes Agent 和 OpenClaw有什么区别
recentSessions.summary: Hermes Agent 和 OpenClaw有什么区别？是不是比后者更牛

recentSessions.title: 你在这个群里的身份是“缘缘·生活版”
recentSessions.summary: 你在这个群里的身份是“缘缘·生活版”。 主要负责和我聊生活、日常安排、情绪支持、消费建议、旅行、美食、健康习惯、效率习惯。 风格：轻松、自然、有人味，但不要太啰嗦。 优先给直接可执行的建议，不要过度说教。 不要默认切到职业/技术视角，除非我主动问。 [System: The content may include...

insights.title: OpenClaw is part of the weekly workflow
insights.description: Active on 4 of the last 30 days, which looks more like a habit than occasional experimentation.

insights.title: Conversations skew toward building
insights.description: Recent sessions are less about one-off Q&A and more about turning ideas into scripts, repos, dashboards, and automations.

automationIdeas.title: Weekly board refresh
automationIdeas.description: Regenerate the dashboard data, review the diff, then commit and push a fresh snapshot each week.

automationIdeas.title: Keyword digest
automationIdeas.description: Store weekly top keywords and topic clusters so the board can show trend changes instead of just a latest snapshot.

automationIdeas.title: Repo activity join-up
automationIdeas.description: Pair session summaries with git commits to show which conversations actually turned into shipped changes.

automationIdeas.title: Quota alert card
automationIdeas.description: Highlight provider windows that are close to reset or close to exhaustion instead of only showing raw percentages.
